sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88279" key="properieile/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προπερι-ειλέω</orth>, <sense id="n88279.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wrap round first,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">-ειλημένος ἐρίῳ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:9:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.9.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
